message:
chore(audit): record batch 427 (oracle determinism, wasm_abi)

Verified spork oracles all sort HashMap keys before iteration (SOUND).
Verified quiescence oracle uses Vec for violations (SOUND).
Verified wasm_abi.rs has no dangerous casts or arithmetic (SOUND).

Grand total: 38 bugs fixed, 220+ files audited, ~300K+ lines (~97%).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
